agents.name: probe-writer
agents.mission: Verify that the hardened launcher can create one bounded file and return a short summary.
agents.task: Create or replace launcher-probe.txt in the working directory containing exactly the text OK.
validation: Ensure the file content is exactly OK.
return_contract: State whether launcher-probe.txt was created and verified.
stop_when: Stop after the file exists, the content is verified, and the summary is returned.
